data.name: Lisa Total investigation!
data.detailed_description:
來認識保羅和他的未婚妻麗莎吧！他們對婚禮充滿期待，但事情卻朝著最糟的方向發展。首先，一場可疑的意外奪走了他們朋友的性命。接著，一名蘇格蘭場的探員招募保羅成為臥底特工……他們捲入了一場將永遠改變彼此關係的調查。我想，在通往婚姻的路上，真的有許多事情可能出錯！

可以確定的是，他們的生活將不再一樣……

在這款互動小說中，你將扮演準新郎的角色。你會面臨多種選擇，而這些選擇將影響你與她的關係。

當你知道你的未婚妻決定停用避孕藥，打算在婚禮上向所有人展示她的懷孕時，你還會選擇與最好的朋友分享你的女友，或者努力阻止她被好色的顧客染指嗎？選擇權在你手中！

麗莎還會遭遇一些奇特的性癖，例如寵物扮演和家具化（將人當成物品）。

這個深不見底的兔子洞，究竟會延伸到哪裡呢……

他們的婚禮儀式必將與以往任何一場大不相同！

目前進度：

第一部已完成！

  • 大約 9 小時的內容以及大量 H 場景！

  • 超過 90,000 字

  • 3200 張靜態 CG

  • 88 段流暢動畫

  • 57 首音樂

第二部幾乎完成，已經包含：

  • 大約 3 小時 55 分鐘的內容！

  • 超過 118,500 字

  • 2,841 張靜態渲染圖

  • 107 個流暢的動畫

  • 105 首音樂

data.short_description: 《Lisa Total investigation》是一款以腐化為主題的成人遊戲。你將扮演麗莎的未婚夫，因一名神祕的蘇格蘭場探員而被迫捲入調查。為了完成任務，你會把未婚妻逼到什麼程度？小心你內心最黑暗的慾望！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 德文, 義大利文, 俄文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: 雙核心或更高
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 或更高，或 AMD 等效產品
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 或更高版本
  • 處理器: 雙核心或更高
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 或更高，或 AMD 等效產品
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

最低配備:
  • 處理器: 雙核心或更高
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體

data.name: Lisa Total investigation!
data.detailed_description:
Meet Paul and his fiancée, Lisa! They have exciting plans for the big day, but things take a turn for the worst. First, there is a suspicious accident in which one of their friends is killed. Then, a Scotland Yard officer recruits Paul as an undercover agent… They become involved in an investigation that will change their relationship forever. I guess many things can go wrong on the road to marriage!

What is certain is that their lives will never be the same...

In this virtual novel, you play the role of the future groom. You will have multiple choices that have impacts on your relation.

Knowing your fiancée decided to go off the pill to show her pregnancy to everyone at the wedding, will you still share your girlfriend with your best friend and/or try to keep her away from your perverted customer? This is your choice!

Lisa will also encounter strange fetishes like pet play and forniphilia (objectifying people).

How deep will the rabbit hole go…

Their wedding ceremony will surely be unlike any other before!

At the moment :

Part One is finished!

  • there are about 9 hours of content and lots of H scene!

  • more than 90,000 words

  • 3200 static renders

  • 88 smoothed animations

  • 57 musics

Part Two is nearly finished and already contain:

  • about 3 hour and 55 minutes of content!

  • more than 118,500 words

  • 2,841 static renders

  • 107 smoothed animations

  • 105 musics

data.short_description: Lisa Total investigation is an adult game about corruption. Play as the future husband of Lisa, who was forced into an investigation by a mysterious Scotland Yard officer. How far will you push your fiancée to successfully complete this investigation? Beware of your most perverse desire!
data.supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, German, Italian, Russian, Traditional Chinese, Turkish

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7, 8, 10, 11
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space

Minimum:
  • OS: 10.6 or higher
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • Storage: 4 GB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
